data.name: Cinder-Iron Veins
data.properties: Iron ore that must be smelted with volcanic heat.

data.name: Magma Pearls
data.properties: Rare pearls found in lava tubes that retain immense heat.

data.name: The Great Forge
data.symbol: A volcano with an anvil at its peak
data.description: A deity representing the creative and destructive power of the volcano.

data.name: The Anvil Peak
data.description: The central volcano, considered a holy site for all smiths.

data.name: Moonwood Grove
data.properties: A forest of trees with luminescent sap, best harvested at night.

data.name: Sungrass Plains
data.properties: Fields of grass that store sunlight, providing a potent food source.

data.name: Lyra, the Moonmaiden
data.description: Goddess of the hunt and the mysteries of the night.

data.name: The Silver Falls
data.description: A waterfall whose spray glows under the moonlight.

data.name: Bloodroot Swamp
data.properties: A swamp where the roots of trees produce a blood-red, life-giving sap.

data.name: Wyvern Nests
data.properties: High cliffs where wyverns nest. Their eggs and venom are valuable.

data.name: Grak, the Skull-Taker
data.description: The brutal god worshipped by the orcish clans.

data.name: The Proving Grounds
data.description: A dangerous canyon where young orcs prove their strength.
